description.en: Write the bytes in bytes into memory at the current position of the file pointer and return the number of bytes written (never less than len(bytes), since if the write fails, a ValueError will be raised). The file position is updated to point after the bytes that were written. If the mmap was created with ACCESS_READ, then writing to it will raise a TypeError exception. Changed in version 3.5: Writable bytes-like object is now accepted. Changed in version 3.6: The number of bytes written is n...

description.en: Write the integer byte into memory at the current position of the file pointer; the file position is advanced by 1. If the mmap was created with ACCESS_READ, then writing to it will raise a TypeError exception.
